summary: Completed testing of 10 new customer-facing features for BidBlitz Penny Auction Platform. All 23 backend API tests passed (100%). All 4 frontend pages tested successfully.

subscription_api.GET /api/subscription/my-subscription: PASS - Returns user subscription status (requires auth)
subscription_api.Plan structure validation: PASS - All plans have correct fields (name, price, bids_per_month, bonus_bids, features)

bid_buddy_api.GET /api/bid-buddy/my-buddies: PASS - Returns empty list for new users (requires auth)
bid_buddy_api.GET /api/bid-buddy/status/{auction_id}: PASS - Returns status object with active flag

achievements_api.GET /api/achievements/my-achievements: PASS - Returns user progress with stats

testimonials_api.GET /api/testimonials/videos: PASS - Returns videos list (empty for new platform)

frontend_subscription_page.3 plans displayed: PASS - Basic, Pro, Elite plans visible

frontend_bid_buddy_page.Title: PASS - 'Bid Buddy' title visible
frontend_bid_buddy_page.Subtitle: PASS - 'Dein automatischer Bieter' visible
frontend_bid_buddy_page.Active buddies section: PASS - 'Aktive Bid Buddies' section with empty state

frontend_testimonials_page.Title: PASS - 'Gewinner-Videos' title visible
frontend_testimonials_page.Video grid: PASS - Placeholder videos (iPhone, MacBook, PlayStation) displayed

frontend_badges_page.Title: PASS - 'Achievements' title visible
frontend_badges_page.Category filters: PASS - Alle, Bieten, Gewinnen, Spezial, Sozial, Treue
frontend_badges_page.Progress bars: PASS - Next achievements with progress visible

critical_code_review_comments: All 10 new features implemented correctly with proper API structure
Subscription plans have correct pricing and bid allocations
Achievements system has 18 achievements across 5 categories with German/English support
All authenticated endpoints properly return 401 when no token provided
Frontend pages have proper data-testid attributes for testing
Video testimonials page shows placeholder videos when no real videos exist
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_new_customer_features.py - Created comprehensive test suite for 10 new features
seed_data_creation: No seed data created - using existing test accounts

mocked_apis_list: Tawk.to Live Chat (placeholder - needs user's Tawk.to ID)

context_for_next_testing_agent: 10 new customer-facing features fully tested and working: Subscription Plans (3 tiers), Bid Buddy (auto-bidder), Buy It Now (bid credit), Achievements (18 badges), Video Testimonials, Win Notifications, Countdown Alarm. All APIs return correct data. Frontend pages load correctly with proper data-testid attributes. Stripe integration is in test mode.
